seoTitle: Namoi River vs Nana Glen — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Namoi River vs Nana Glen: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Namoi River and Nana Glen.
heading: Namoi River vs Nana Glen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Namoi River, New South Wales and Nana Glen, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nana Glen has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Namoi River (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Namoi River or Nana Glen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Namoi River has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Nana Glen scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Namoi River scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Nana Glen scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Namoi River or Nana Glen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nana Glen has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
